title: Flowers Bread Route, Stillwater, OK
reasonForSelling: The owner is pursuing another business opportunity.
supportTraining: Owner and company will train. Most company routes require the buyer to form an entity (must be an INC). If you need help with this visit https://www.routesforsale.net/incorporate.html
description:
Imagine stepping into a turnkey bread distribution business that's already proven successful in Stillwater, Oklahoma! This Flowers Bread Route offers you the chance to partner with a NYSE-traded company while enjoying the independence of running your own operation.

You'll be distributing beloved household brands like Nature's Own, Wonder, Sunbeam, Dave's Killer Bread, and Tasty Cake - products people buy every week. With 13 established accounts including popular grocery stores, variety stores, and restaurants, you're not starting from scratch. Your customers are already there, waiting for their regular deliveries.

Here's what makes this opportunity special: you'll gross approximately $475,534 annually while netting $73,684. The numbers speak for themselves, and this route has a track record you can trust. Plus, you'll have a protected territory, meaning no competition from other Flowers distributors in your area.

Worried about financing? The company offers financing options with an estimated $40,000 down payment, making this dream more accessible than you might think. You'll also need a 10% cash reserve, which shows you're serious about success.

What you'll love most is the security of working with an established brand backed by Flowers Baking Company. Your customers know these products, trust them, and buy them consistently. You're not trying to convince people to try something new - you're delivering what they already want.

This isn't just buying a route; you're investing in a business model that works, in a territory that's yours to grow, with support from a company that's been succeeding for decades.

Ad#:2455544
